rationale: Docs-only accuracy pass exactly matching the PR body. CHANGELOG.md swaps the stray v2.0 capabilities reference for v1.1.3 capabilities. README.md bumps three Docker pull and run command examples from v1.0.0 to v1.2.6 for both GHCR and Docker Hub registries. docs/ROADMAP.md annotates the MSI Installer row as superseded by portable ZIP in v1.1.3+ and reclassifies the Versioned JSON and CSV export row from In Progress / Next to Planned with a note that JSON output shipped but versioned schema and CSV did not. docs/STATUS.md flips the Security Hardening section from In Progress to Released in v1.2.x with a note that cargo-deny, cargo-audit, and fuzz smoke regression gates are active. Each edit corresponds to a contradiction the body enumerates, and the changes are confined to .md files with no source modifications, matching the testing claim of cargo check and cargo clippy passing trivially.
